jira_context.summary: Change must-gather directory name in must-gather-operator
acceptance_criteria: Directory naming convention is consistent across oc adm mustgather

logic_verification.intent_justification: The implementation generates directory names following the format 'must-gather.local.<cluster-id-suffix>.<timestamp>.<random>' which matches the oc adm must-gather convention. The code retrieves the cluster ID from ClusterVersion resource, formats timestamps as YYYYMMDDTHHMMSSZ, and adds a 6-digit random suffix for uniqueness.
logic_verification.happy_path: When ClusterVersion is accessible: retrieves cluster ID → takes last 12 chars → formats timestamp → generates random suffix → returns directory name like 'must-gather.local.ef0123456789.20260617T143025Z.042315'
logic_verification.error_path: When ClusterVersion is inaccessible: logs warning → continues without cluster ID → returns fallback format 'must-gather.local.20260617T143025Z.042315'

issues.description: Unreachable Error Handling: generateMustGatherDirectoryName() always returns nil for the error (line 74), but the controller checks for this error at mustgather_controller.go:415-417. This is defensive programming but the error check will never trigger. Not a bug, just unnecessary code.
issues.fix_prompt: Consider either: (1) removing the error return type from generateMustGatherDirectoryName and making it return only string, or (2) actually returning an error in extreme edge cases. Current implementation is safe but the error handling is dead code.

issues.description: E2E Test Coverage: Jira acceptance criteria requests 'Add relevant UT and E2E'. Unit tests are comprehensive (426 lines in directory_naming_test.go covering format validation, uniqueness, cluster ID handling). E2E tests were generated (in output/e2e_must-gather-operator/) but not yet committed to test/e2e/. This is acceptable as E2E tests are often added in follow-up commits or separate PRs.
issues.fix_prompt: Copy the generated E2E tests from output/e2e_must-gather-operator/e2e_test.go to test/e2e/directory_naming_test.go and commit them to fully satisfy the Jira acceptance criteria.
